title: selaginella monticola
intro: Selaginella monticola, a species of spikemoss, is a type of small, delicate, and evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella monticola include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a capsule supplement, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and side effects.
